title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Great Learning Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Great Learning Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Great Learning Digital Technologies in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Great Learning Digital Technologies:
Great Learning Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning Digital Technologies!
